settings_hub_schedule_desc: Weekly hours, time off, calendar sync.
settings_hub_company_desc: Company name, logo, brand color, report theme.
settings_hub_contractor_types_desc: Recommended contractor categories for repair items.
settings_hub_inspection_types_desc: Custom inspection categories for your company.
settings_hub_integrations_desc: QuickBooks, Stripe keys, calendar & API connections.
settings_hub_communication_desc: Email and SMS delivery. Inspectors connect calendars under My Schedule.
settings_hub_compliance_desc: GDPR retention window, erasure request records.
settings_hub_usage_desc: SMS, email, and storage this account has used.
settings_profile_subtitle: Inspector identity that appears on every report you generate.
settings_profile_timezone_hint: Overrides how times appear for you only. Reports and calendar events always use the company timezone.
settings_profile_locale_hint: Overrides how dates, times, and numbers are formatted for you only. Leave on the workspace default to inherit the company setting.
settings_profile_photo_subtitle: Your avatar on the public company booking page.
settings_profile_photo_hint: JPG, PNG, or WebP. Max 2 MB. Square crop renders best.
settings_profile_credentials_subtitle: Association memberships and licenses shown on your reports, emails, and booking page. Upload a badge image, or add a text credential.
settings_profile_credentials_empty: No credentials yet. Add one to show it on your reports.
settings_profile_signature_subtitle: The business-card footer added to emails you send. Built from the fields above — save your profile to refresh the preview.
settings_profile_signature_empty: Add your name (and phone/license) above to build a signature.
settings_profile_saved_signature_subtitl: Your signature is applied to agreements you send and can be used for auto-sign on report publish.
settings_security_subtitle: Password, two-factor authentication, account data, and security settings.
settings_security_delete_description: Permanently delete your account and all associated data including inspections, reports, templates, and client records. This action cannot be undone.
settings_security_error_export_failed: Data export failed. Please try again.
settings_security_export_success_message: Data export complete. Your account data is available below.
settings_workspace_subtitle: Branding, report theme, and referral sources.
settings_workspace_timezone_subtitle: Reports, reminders, and calendar events use this timezone. Individual users can override how times appear for them in their profile.
settings_workspace_timezone_detected: Detected from your browser. Save to confirm, or pick another.
settings_workspace_locale_currency_subti: Controls how dates, times, numbers, and money are formatted across reports and the dashboard. Individual users can override the language/locale in their profile; currency is company-wide.
settings_workspace_report_style_subtitle: Pick a look for client-facing reports. Your brand colour and logo apply on top.
settings_workspace_referral_custom_place:
Magazine ad
Trade show
Referral partner
settings_workspace_referral_custom_hint: One label per line. Maximum 32 entries; duplicates are ignored.
settings_workspace_repair_list_desc: Displays a summarised Repair List tab on the published client report.
settings_workspace_repair_export_title: Allow clients to build repair requests
settings_workspace_repair_export_desc: Lets clients, agents, and inspectors build a shareable repair-request addendum from a published report.
settings_workspace_report_pdf_subtitle: Print-layout options for downloadable report PDFs.
settings_workspace_company_address_hint: Shown in the report PDF footer block.
settings_workspace_pdf_footer_desc: Renders the company footer block at the bottom of each report PDF page.
settings_workspace_pdf_page_numbers_desc: Adds page numbers to the report PDF.
settings_workspace_pdf_license_desc: Includes the inspector license number on the report PDF.
settings_data_subtitle: Download your data or import contacts from other platforms.
settings_data_export_subtitle: Download your data as CSV or JSON. All historical records are included.
settings_data_import_subtitle: Supports Spectora and Inspector Toolbelt export formats. Duplicates (same email) are skipped.
settings_data_cleanup_subtitle: Remove test data or request a full GDPR data export.
settings_usage_subtitle_free: What this account has used on the free plan. Storage is measured once a day.
settings_usage_subtitle_saas: What this account has consumed. Inspections/SMS/email are cumulative totals; storage is measured once a day.
settings_usage_subtitle_standalone: What this account has consumed. SMS/email are cumulative totals; storage is measured once a day.
settings_team_empty_desc: Invite team members above to get started.
settings_team_role_owner_desc: Account holder. Full access, including billing.
settings_team_role_manager_desc: Back office: team, settings, scheduling, and all inspections.
settings_team_role_inspector_desc: Conducts inspections; edits and publishes reports.
settings_team_role_agent_desc: External agent. Read-only access to their own orders.
